name: Maritime Resources Corp.
description: Maritime Resources Corp. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of precious metal projects. The company's primary asset is the high-grade Hammerdown Gold Project, located in the Baie Verte Mining District of Newfoundland and Labrador. Maritime Resources is dedicated to advancing this fully permitted project toward commercial production while maintaining a commitment to responsible exploration and sustainable development practices within the region's established mining infrastructure. The company is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol MAE.
